INCIDENTDETAILS: an operator named Mr. Chetananda Behera working in IPP Truck Tippler area reported that a Coal Truck Driver  (Vehicle No. OD 16M 0262)  named Mr. Vikash Kumar, working under the Contractor M/S Matarani Transport attempted to commit suicide in the IPP Truck Tippler area after unloading his truck at the truck tippler path no. 4. It was informed that he went below the vehicle and jumped inside the coal hopper of path no. 3. The operator deputed at the site observed this incident and immediately stopped the operations. He was taken to the medical center. IP was tested for the alcohol, drug and the test reports were found negative. Immediately the police was called. IP was brought to the police and complaint was given. Police checked the CCTV footage. IP was handed over to the vehicle owner by the police safely.
